availability_zones.description: The availability zone names of the event router cluster.

created_at.description: The creation time of the event router cluster, in RFC3339 format.

description.description: The description of the event router cluster.

flavor.description: The flavor of the event router cluster.

job_count.description: The number of jobs running in the event router cluster.

name.description: The name of the event router cluster.

region.description: The region where the event router cluster is located.

sink_type.description: The sink type of the event router cluster.

source_type.description: The source type of the event router cluster.

status.description: The status of the event router cluster.

subnet_id.description: The subnet ID to which the event router cluster belongs.

updated_at.description: The latest update time of the event router cluster, in RFC3339 format.

vpc_id.description: The VPC ID to which the event router cluster belongs.
